en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Colombia Occupational Health and Safety Management SG-SST documentation in the Colombia Occupational Health and Safety Management System SG-SST Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Colombia Occupational Health and Safety Management System SG-SST Work Plan

The SG-SST Work Plan is a document created by the company that outlines the concrete activities, deadlines, assigned personnel, resources, and measurable goals for the company’s Occupational Health and Safety Management System during a 12-month period.

Colombia Resolution 0312 Colombia Decree 1072
Please upload your SG-SST Work Plan.
